phrases.en: Pam wants to chat with her old college friends.
phrases.zh: 帕姆想和她的老同学们聊天。

phrases.en: She unlocks her phone and opens the chat app.
phrases.zh: 她解锁手机，打开聊天应用。

phrases.en: She taps on the group chat at the top of the list.
phrases.zh: 她点按列表顶部的群聊。

phrases.en: A small red badge shows five new messages.
phrases.zh: 一个红色小标记显示有五条新消息。

phrases.en: She scrolls up slowly and reads them carefully.
phrases.zh: 她慢慢往上滑，仔细地读这些消息。

phrases.en: Her friend Kate asks about the weekend trip.
phrases.zh: 她的朋友凯特在问周末出游的事。

phrases.en: Pam taps the text box at the bottom of the screen.
phrases.zh: 帕姆点按屏幕底部的文本框。

phrases.en: She types a short and friendly reply.
phrases.zh: 她打了一条简短又友好的回复。

phrases.en: She wants to sound happy, so she adds a smiling emoji.
phrases.zh: 她想让语气显得开心，于是加了一个微笑表情。

phrases.en: She reads her message again to check the spelling.
phrases.zh: 她又把消息读了一遍，检查拼写。

phrases.en: Then, she taps the send button.
Her reply appears in the chat right away.
phrases.zh: 她的回复立刻出现在群聊里。

phrases.en: Her friends quickly answer with a thumbs-up.
phrases.zh: 朋友们很快回了一个大拇指。
